card_description: Chrissy is a historical figure referenced in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. Associated with dictionary terms: Chrissy. Context: "Dick proposes a radical new theory: "Valis" and "Thomas" are not external gods or ancient people, but PKD's own "future evolved self" traveling backward in time via the gene-pool."
